/usr/bin/ar qc libuml001_core.a CMakeFiles/uml001_core.dir/src/core/bft_quorum_clock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uml001_core.dir/src/core/crypto_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uml001_core.dir/src/core/os_strong_clock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uml001_core.dir/src/core/simple_file_vault_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uml001_core.dir/src/core/cold_vault.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uml001_core.dir/src/core/vault_logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uml001_core.dir/src/core/key_rotation_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uml001_core.dir/src/core/ntp_observation_fetcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uml001_core.dir/src/core/simple_hash_provider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/uml001_core.dir/generated/clock_service.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/uml001_core.dir/generated/clock_service.grpc.pb.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libuml001_core.a
